title: Promote agent-by-agent activity log to standard report format
goal: User reviewed the post-TASK-017 multi-agent report and wants the agent-by-agent activity log style to become the standard reports/TASK-{ID}.md content. Authority docs must be updated so that future Tier 2/3 reports replace the legacy 수행 결과/수행 과정 trio with a central 에이전트별 활동 이력 section that captures each agent's actual work substance, decisions, tool usage, deliverable narrative, and per-attempt journey.

include: docs/schemas/output-formats.md (최종 보고서 작성 기준 section + add 에이전트별 활동 이력 spec)
reports/TASK-EXAMPLE.md (replace example body with new agent-activity-log template based on TASK-017 real run)
CURRENT_STATE.md (version pointers for the two updated authority docs)
exclude: Existing legacy reports (TASK-001 through TASK-017) stay as-is
logs/sessions/*.md format unchanged (these remain log files, not reports)

success_criteria: docs/schemas/output-formats.md 최종 보고서 작성 기준 section requires 에이전트별 활동 이력 as the central technical section for Tier 2/3 reports.
docs/schemas/output-formats.md defines per-agent template fields (호출 여부, 런타임 메타, 실제 한 일, 시도 여정) explicitly.
reports/TASK-EXAMPLE.md uses TASK-20260429-017 real Validator-A run as a concrete in-document example demonstrating the new format.
Both authority docs have bumped versions and matching CURRENT_STATE pointers.
TASK-20260429-018 ledger has TASK_CREATED, GENERATION_COMPLETED, VALIDATION_RESULT, MERGE_COMPLETED, REPORT_WRITTEN, TASK_COMPLETED with insight_capture.
reports/TASK-20260429-018.md is itself written in the new agent-activity-log format (self-applying the new standard).
logs/quality-scores.jsonl has a row for TASK-20260429-018.

positive: Keep the existing executive summary section first (decision-makers still read it first).
Show real numbers (cost, duration, turns, exit_status) when known.
Use one short paragraph per agent describing substance, not bullet checklists of file paths.
negative: Do not delete legacy report examples in TASK-EXAMPLE.md if they document distinct scenarios (Resource Failure, Adjudication) that are not yet covered by new examples.
Do not include secrets, credentials, or PII.
Do not retroactively rewrite TASK-001 through TASK-017 reports.
